summary: Add real click-through actions to the existing Site Dashboard Needs Attention rows so missing mentor, revision follow-up, presentation follow-up, and archive failure warnings open real scoped worklists.
selectedReason: Current repo evidence showed that `workspace.js` already rendered route-backed attention buttons whenever the payload included `actionSection` and `actionPreset`, but `functions/api/site/dashboard.ts` still emitted summary-only rows even though the existing Student Directory, Review Queue, and Operations presets already covered the needed destinations. That made this the smallest safe product-readiness batch with real functional value.

candidateTable.decision: deferred: safe next follow-on after this helper mapping lands
deferred: no site-backed audit destination is proven yet
deferred: backend queue rows are still absent
deferred: mutation and audit design still needed
deferred: no exact existing destination is proven for that attention row yet
deferred: no exact existing destination is proven for that attention row yet
deferred: hosted fake-account runtime is outside this local batch

changes: Updated `functions/api/site/dashboard.ts` so the existing Site Dashboard Needs Attention payload emits route-backed actions for missing mentor coverage, revision follow-up, presentation follow-up, and archive failures.
Chose role-safe action labels that keep the Review Queue button absent for Administration while still exposing Student Directory and Operations drill-downs where those sections already exist.

Extended `scripts/verify-dashboard-actions.mjs` to assert the site-dashboard helper mappings directly and refreshed stale Viewer monitoring and Operations dashboard expectations to the current source.
Expanded `tests/workspace-app.test.mjs` to keep the Site Dashboard render proof current after the new attention-row drill-downs.
nextRecommended: Add role-safe Site Dashboard Next Actions drill-downs using the same proven Students, Review Queue, and Operations presets, or keep recent activity summary-only until a site-backed audit destination is proven.
doNotRepeat: Do not revert Site Dashboard Needs Attention rows to summary-only when the existing Student Directory, Review Queue, and Operations presets still back those actions.
Do not expose Review Queue actions to Administration while the role still lacks that section and route visibility contract.
Do not invent a recent-activity destination until a backed site-safe route exists.
